text:
Hyperlipidemia - Medicaid Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
 HYPLIP_COMBINED_EVER Hyperlipidemia - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 HYPLIP_MEDICARE_EVER Hyperlipidemia - Medicare Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 HYPLIP_MEDICAID_EVER Hyperlipidemia - Medicaid Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 HYPTEN_COMBINED Hypertension
